evidences.title: Twitter under Elon Musk - Wikipedia
evidences.content: A computational analysis published on November 1, 2024, found potential algorithmic bias on X in favour of Republican Party "Republican Party (United States)") supporters. The study, which looked at more than 56,000 posts, identified a system-wide "structural break" on the platform around July 13, 2024, a date which coincides with Elon Musk's endorsement of Donald Trump in the 2024 US presidential election. From that point on, Elon Musk and other Republican commentators saw increased visibility for their posts. According to the researchers behind the study, this "could imply an algorithmic adjustment". On January 17, 2025, the European Commission requested to see X's internal documentation about its algorithms "and any recent changes made to it", following accusations of manipulation [...] > You have said the actual truth Nov 15, 2023 In November 2023, Musk replied to an antisemitic tweet which supported the white genocide conspiracy theory and accused Jews of "pushing the exact kind of dialectical hatred against whites that they claim to want people to stop using against them". Musk responded that the tweet "said the actual truth". Following this reply, Musk affirmed white nati...

evidences.title: Elon Musk thanked President Donald Trump in a post on ... - Facebook
evidences.content: ## The Hodgetwins's Post ### The Hodgetwins November 20, 2025 · Elon Musk thanked President Donald Trump in a post on X (formerly Twitter) on November 19, 2025, saying, "I would like to thank Donald Trump for all he has done for America and the world." This came shortly after Trump made a comment at a U.S.–Saudi investment forum asking, “Has he ever thanked me properly?” while referencing Musk. Musk's message appears to signal a shift toward a more cordial relationship with Trump, following months of tension and public disputes between the two. The interaction between Musk and Trump follows a period of high-profile feuding, including Trump’s public remarks and Musk's comments on the state of their relationship.
